titleStmt.title: SII 39.14: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 14. (A.R. No. 14 of 1916.) SAṈṈAVAṈAM, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMNAD DISTRICT. SĀLYAVANĒŚVARA TEMPLE-ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE. TRIBHUVAṈACHAKRAVARTIN KULAŚĒKHARADĒVA-13+10=25TH YEAR.

summary.p: This inscription mentions the gift of taxes, by Māḷavachakravartin mentioned in No. 13, for making offerings in the temples of Tiruchchaṉṉavaṉamuḍaiya-nāyaṉār of Ilaikkaḍambaṅguḷam alias Hiranyasiṁhmaṅgalam, hamlet situated on the east of Piḷār alias Sundarapāṇḍyanallūr in Tiruttiyūrmuṭṭam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tirabhuvaṉac cakravattikaḷ śrī
kulacekaradevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 3 Itin Etir
10- t tāvatu simhanāyaṟṟu Orunāḷ tirut
tiyūr muṭṭattu piḻāraraṉa cuntarapāṇṭiya
nallūr kiḻpiṭākai Ilaikkaṭampaṅku
ḷamāṉa hiraṇyasimhamaṅkalattu tiru
ccanṉavaṉamuṭaiya ṉāyaṉāṟku mummuṭi
coḻan māḷavarmāṇikkamāṉa māḷa
vaccakkravattiyeṉ Inṉāyaṉāṟku
tiruvamutupaṭiyuḷḷiṭṭa vyañanaṅka
ḷukku kaṭampaṅkuḷattu vayal vaḷai
yil cuṟṟu muṟṟilum nampātiyāluḷ
ḷa kaṭamai Āntarāyamum 10 6- cāṇ
kolāl puḷḷipukku rūpāy Orumāvukku ka
ṭamaikkālāl 3 100 9- yum Āntarāya
mṭakam Āṭik kuṟuvai tiṉai Eḷḷu 6
kkum Aṟpikaik kuṟuvai varaku 1- pātiyum
ṉ ceykaḷāl vanta kaṭamaiyum Innila
ttāluḷḷa kaṇakkup peṟu veṭṭi muṭṭuāḷum cilvari peruvariyu maṟṟum Epperp
paṭṭanavum Inṉāyiṉāṟku candrādityavaṟ celvatāka nirvāṟtuk kuṭutteṉ māḷavaccakravattiyan vilakkili paṉmāheśvararakṣai
Digital edition of SII 39.14 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
